mapper.sql: select id, orthanc_study_id, study_instance_uid, study_description, study_date, accession_number, patient_id, patient_name, patient_sex, patient_birth_date, modality, series_count, instance_count, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from dcm_study
mapper.insert: insert into dcm_study (orthanc_study_id, study_instance_uid, study_description, study_date, accession_number, patient_id, patient_name, patient_sex, patient_birth_date, modality, series_count, instance_count, upload_user_id, upload_user_name, status, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag) values (#{orthancStudyId}, #{studyInstanceUid}, #{studyDescription}, #{studyDate}, #{accessionNumber}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{patientSex}, #{patientBirthDate}, #{modality}, #{seriesCount}, #{instanceCount}, #{uploadUserId}, #{uploadUserName}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate(), #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update dcm_study set orthanc_study_id = #{orthancStudyId}, study_description = #{studyDescription}, study_date = #{studyDate}, accession_number = #{accessionNumber}, patient_id = #{patientId}, patient_name = #{patientName}, patient_sex = #{patientSex}, patient_birth_date = #{patientBirthDate}, modality = #{modality}, series_count = #{seriesCount}, instance_count = #{instanceCount}, upload_user_id = #{uploadUserId}, upload_user_name = #{uploadUserName}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), del_flag = #{delFlag} where id = #{id}
update dcm_study set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
